THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAHLAVAN, AFSANEH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FISHER, WENDY COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF CANNOT RECOVER BECAUSE (1) THE INJURED DOG WAS OFF LEASH IN VIOLATION OF SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CODE 41.12; (2) THERE WAS INSUFFICIENT PROOF THAT DEFENDANT'S SPEEDING CAUSED THE ACCIDENT.
